Game.Name: Tecmo Super NBA Basketball (Japan) (En) (Rev 1)
Game.plot: Overview:Tecmo Super NBA Basketball is a 5-on-5 basketball game, published by Tecmo and developed by Acclaim for the SNES and Sega Genesis. The game includes a season mode, with three season lengths (Short, Reduced, and Regular), as well as the option to play a pre-season game and an all-star game. The game includes a battery, allowing the player to save their game.RostersThe following are the teams in the game and their rosters.Atlanta HawksStartersGuards: Rumeal Robinson, Stacey AugmonForwards: Dominique Wilkins, Kevin WillisCenter: Blair RasmussenReservesGuards: Morlon Wiley, Rodney Monroe, Maurice CheeksForwards: Duane Ferrell, Paul Graham, Alexander VolkovCenter: John KoncakBoston CelticsStartersGuards: John Bagley, Dee BrownForwards: Reggie Lewis, Larry BirdCenter: Robert ParishReservesGuards: Rickey Green, Kevin GambleForwards: Rick Fox, Kevin Mchale, Ed PinckneyCenter: Joe Kleine, Stojko VrrankovicCharlotte HornetsStartersGuards: Tyrone (Muggsy) Bogues, Rex ChapmanForwards: Kenny Gattison, Larry JohnsonCenter: Mike GminskiReservesGuards: Kevin Lynch, Kendall Gill, Dell CurryForwards: Anthony Frederick, Johnny Newman, J.R. ReidCenter: Eric LecknerChicago BullsStartersGuards: John Paxson, Michael JordanForwards: Scottie Pippen, Horace GrantCenter: Bill CartwrightReservesGuards: B.J.
